name: Corn Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh or whole kernel canned corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop and drain the corn.
2. Add the egg to the corn, then sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt).
3. Stir in the corn, then fold in the beaten egg white.
4. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot fat heated to 370 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Cook until lightly browned, then drain on paper towel.
P.S. You can substitute finely chopped apples or raisins for the corn if desired.
Source: An old Fannie Farmer cookbook and my mother
